overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a hazy industrial district with palm trees and power lines, then transitioning to a bright sunny commercial intersection featuring floating holographic billboards and a prominent red rock mountain backdrop.

ego turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial street lined with palm trees and overhead power lines. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk, crosses an asphalt road at a crosswalk, and passes sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles in the hazy morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete ramp with graffiti walls alongside highway

events.description: ego enters a concrete ramp leading upward, walls closing in on both sides
fog begins to clear as the ramp ascends, sky becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp alongside a highway, passing graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: black armored truck driving up the road alongside the ramp

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in graffiti tags
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete ramp flanked by graffiti-covered walls and a metal guardrail. Vehicles including a large black truck pass by on the adjacent road. The fog gradually clears as the ramp rises, revealing more sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny commercial intersection with floating holographic billboards

events.description: fog completely clears revealing bright blue sky and direct sunlight
entering commercial district with large floating billboard and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy intersection under floating billboards, observing the holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in pink hat walking across the street

entered.detail: large rectangular floating advertisement with thrusters underneath
large reddish-brown rock formation dominating the background
giant green glowing holographic advertisement projection
large yellow construction cranes near the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ramp into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a wide commercial intersection. A massive floating billboard hovers overhead against a clear blue sky, while a large red rock mountain rises in the background. The character crosses the street among moderate pedestrian traffic, passing holographic displays and various commercial structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy industrial district that gradually opens into a vibrant, sunlit commercial hub. It begins on a foggy street lined with palm trees and overhead power lines, following a character as they navigate a concrete sidewalk and cross an asphalt road through the morning mist. As the character ascends a concrete ramp flanked by graffiti-covered walls and passing trucks, the fog steadily clears to reveal an expanding view of the sky. The scene then opens into a wide, bright intersection where the lighting shifts to brilliant sunlight, unveiling a massive floating billboard and a prominent red rock mountain in the distance. Finally, the camera moves through a bustling commercial area filled with holographic displays and pedestrian traffic under a clear blue sky.
